releases.author: TimDommett
releases.description:
## 🐛 Fixed: sync failing with HTTP 400 on document downloads

reMarkable's sync v3 API began requiring a validated `rm-filename` header on `GET /sync/v3/files/{hash}`. Without it the server returned **HTTP 400** (`unexpected 'rm-filename' http header`), which broke **all** document downloads.

This release sends the correct header value for every blob type — the root index (`root.docSchema`), per-document indexes (`<uuid>.docSchema`), and content files (their real filename) — restoring sync.

Fixes #12.

## 🙏 Credits

Huge thanks to **[@nicolevanderhoeven](https://github.com/nicolevanderhoeven)** for diagnosing this against the live API and contributing the fix in #14, complete with offline regression tests. Much appreciated!

## 📥 Installation

Update via Obsidian → **Settings → Community plugins**, or manually place `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/remarkable-sync/` folder.

**Full changelog:** https://github.com/TimDommett/Remarkable-Sync---Obsidian-Plugin/compare/1.0.3...1.0.4

releases.author: TimDommett
releases.description:
## Changes

- Add `versions.json` (required for Obsidian community plugin registry)
- Add `fundingUrl` and `authorUrl` to manifest
- Add privacy & data disclosures to README

## Install

1. Download **main.js**, **manifest.json**, and **styles.css** below
2. Create a `remarkable-sync/` folder in `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
3. Place the three files inside it
4. Enable in Obsidian Settings → Community Plugins

releases.name: v1.0.1

releases.author: TimDommett
releases.description:
## reMarkable Sync for Obsidian v1.0.0

Initial release. Sync your reMarkable Paper Pro documents to your Obsidian vault as high-fidelity PDFs.

### Installation

1. Download **remarkable-sync.zip** below
2. Extract it — you'll get a `remarkable-sync/` folder
3. Copy that folder into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/`
4. Enable the plugin in Obsidian Settings > Community Plugins

### Features

- Direct reMarkable Cloud sync (sync15/v3 protocol)
- High-fidelity PDF rendering with all 9 pen types
- Full 14-color support including shader and highlighter
- Text rendering with paragraph styles
- Layered drawing support
- Extended (scrolled) page support
- Incremental sync and auto-sync
- Annotated PDF merging
releases.name: v1.0.0
